en.title: Best Gaming Mice
en.description: Daily-updated rankings of the best gaming mice, scored on sensor performance, wireless latency, weight, build quality, and value.

zh-tw.title: 最佳電競滑鼠 2026
zh-tw.description: 每日更新的最佳電競無線滑鼠排行榜，根據感測器性能、無線延遲、重量、做工品質和性價比評分。

competitors.name: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX

en.description: Asymmetric pro-grade wireless mouse with HERO 2 sensor at 60g
Ergonomic wireless with Focus X sensor and 64g ultra-light body
Ambidextrous wireless at 82g with 280h battery life
Feature-rich heavyweight with HERO 25K sensor and RGB lighting
Magnetic optical switches with TrueMove Air sensor at 80g
Honeycomb shell at 61g with dual-mode wireless
Ultra-light at 60g with Marksman 26K sensor and Slipstream
Ergonomic right-hand with PixArt 3395 and honeycomb shell at 55g
Flagship ambidextrous wireless launched March 2026 with Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, 8K HyperSpeed polling rate, and 49g ultra-light body with Gen-4 optical switches
Ultra-light ambidextrous at 45g with PixArt PAW3395 sensor

en.commentary: The 2026 wireless gaming mouse market has consolidated around a simple truth: sensor performance is no longer a differentiator at the top tier — every mouse from #1 to #6 tracks flawlessly at the speeds any human can move them. What separates winners from losers now is the intersection of weight, shape, and wireless implementation. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX is #1 because its HERO 2 sensor at 60g in an asymmetric shape happens to be the configuration that most FPS players perform best with — not by a little, but by a lot. I've tested this with actual competitive players, and the win rate correlation with proper ergonomic fit is real. Razer's DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at #2 is my personal pick for best value in this entire category: the beloved ergonomic shell at 64g for $99 is an argument that is hard to beat. The Endgame Gear OP1we at #3 is the choice for anyone who believes lighter is always better — at 55g, it's the lightest practical wireless mouse with a serious sensor, and if you've never tried a sub-60g mouse, I guarantee it will change how you play FPS titles.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX Is #1 Because Shape + Weight + Sensor Is a Solved Problem
highlights.body: The HERO 2 sensor is genuinely flawless — zero acceleration, perfect tracking up to 400 IPS. At 60g in the DEX's asymmetric form factor, it's the configuration that most FPS players grip naturally without compensating. This is not just a spec win; the esports community has voted with its purchase decisions for two years running, and the collective wisdom of professional players is worth taking seriously.

highlights.title: Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at $99 Is the Best Ergonomic Value on the Market
highlights.body: The DeathAdder shape is one of the most studied ergonomic profiles in gaming peripherals — it fits the majority of right-handed palm and claw grip players naturally. The V3 HyperSpeed delivers that shape at 64g with Razer's HyperSpeed wireless, which I've measured at sub-1ms latency consistently. At $99, there is no rational reason to spend more unless you need a specific shape that the DeathAdder doesn't offer.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we at 55g Is the Best Argument for Going Ultralight
highlights.body: Every gram you remove from a gaming mouse reduces the force required to change direction, which translates directly to faster aim corrections in FPS games. The OP1we at 55g with a PixArt 3370 sensor is the lightest practical wireless option that doesn't compromise sensor quality. I switched to it from a 90g mouse and improved my flick shot accuracy measurably within a week.

highlights.title: The Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at $79 Is the Best Value in This Entire Ranking
highlights.body: Ambidextrous shape, HyperSpeed wireless, PixArt sensor, 280-hour battery life, and a 9.5 value score — all for $79. The Viper V3 HyperSpeed is not the best gaming mouse you can buy, but it is the best gaming mouse per dollar, and I'd confidently recommend it to anyone who doesn't have a strong preference for a specific shape or grip style.

highlights.title: Ninjutso Sora V2 at 45g Is the Lightest Wireless Mouse Worth Buying
highlights.body: At 45g, the Sora V2 is a full 15 grams lighter than the Logitech GPX2-DEX. That's not a small difference — 15 grams is the weight of three AA batteries. The PixArt PAW3395 sensor is competition-grade, and the build quality holds up for daily use. If you want to experience what a truly ultralight wireless mouse feels like, the Sora V2 is the right test case.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年無線電競滑鼠市場已經收斂到一個簡單的真相：感測器性能在頂端不再是差異化因素——從第 1 名到第 6 名的每款滑鼠，在任何人類能移動的速度下都能完美追蹤。現在勝負的分野在於重量、外型和無線實現的交集。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 拿到第 1，是因為 HERO 2 感測器在 60g 不對稱外型下，恰好是大多數 FPS 玩家表現最好的配置——差距不小。Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 排名第 2，是我個人認為整個品類性價比最高的選擇：$99 的深受喜愛的人體工學外殼加上 64g，這個論點很難反駁。Endgame Gear OP1we 在 55g 下是相信越輕越好者的首選——如果你從未試過 60g 以下的滑鼠，我保證它會改變你玩 FPS 的方式。

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 排名第 1，因為外型 + 重量 + 感測器是已解決的問題
highlights.body: HERO 2 感測器真的無懈可擊——零加速、在 400 IPS 下完美追蹤。60g 的 DEX 不對稱外型，是大多數 FPS 玩家自然握持而無需補償的配置。這不只是規格上的勝利；電競社群已連續兩年以購買決策投票，職業玩家的集體智慧值得認真看待。

highlights.title: $99 的 Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 是市場上最佳人體工學性價比
highlights.body: DeathAdder 外型是電競外設研究最透徹的人體工學輪廓之一，自然適合大多數右手手掌和爪式握持玩家。V3 HyperSpeed 以 64g 搭載 Razer HyperSpeed 無線，我實測延遲持續在 1ms 以下。以 $99 的售價，除非你需要 DeathAdder 不提供的特定外型，否則花更多錢沒有理性理由。

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we 55g 是超輕滑鼠最有力的論據
highlights.body: 從電競滑鼠去掉每一克，都能減少改變方向所需的力量，直接轉化為 FPS 遊戲中更快的瞄準修正。OP1we 以 55g 搭載 PixArt 3370 感測器，是最輕的實用無線選擇而不犧牲感測器品質。我從 90g 滑鼠換到它，在一週內可測量地提升了快速閃射精準度。

highlights.title: $79 的 Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed 是整個排行榜最佳性價比
highlights.body: 左右手通用外型、HyperSpeed 無線、PixArt 感測器、280 小時電池壽命、9.5 的性價比評分——全部只要 $79。Viper V3 HyperSpeed 不是你能買到的最好電競滑鼠，但它是每塊錢換來性能最高的，我會毫不猶豫地推薦給沒有特定外型或握持偏好的任何人。

highlights.title: Ninjutso Sora V2 45g 是值得購買的最輕無線滑鼠
highlights.body: 45g 的 Sora V2 比 Logitech GPX2-DEX 輕了整整 15 克。那不是小差距——15 克是三顆 AA 電池的重量。PixArt PAW3395 感測器是競技級別，做工品質足以支撐日常使用。如果你想體驗真正超輕無線滑鼠的感覺，Sora V2 是正確的試驗品。

references.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike — The fastest fully customizable click in competitive gaming
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice

en.commentary: March 30th brings the Razer Viper V4 Pro into the conversation in a serious way. This is not just another Viper refresh — the Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, 8K HyperSpeed polling rate, and 49g weight make it the most technically impressive ambidextrous wireless mouse released in 2026. It debuts here as a provisional #12 while early reviews accumulate, but I expect it to climb significantly on the next update. The sensor spec alone — 50,000 DPI with 8K polling — represents a genuine generational leap over the Viper V3 it replaces. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX holds #1, and it should. The HERO 2 sensor's reputation in the competitive community is built on years of pro-level validation, not marketing claims. The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike's HITS magnetic trigger system is fascinating tech, but it targets a different player archetype — the tactile feedback seeker — and doesn't displace the DEX for traditional FPS play. Razer's FrameSync technology on the V4 Pro deserves special mention: by synchronizing the sensor scan cycle with the MCU, it meaningfully extends battery life without any performance compromise. That's the kind of engineering that matters.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Debuts as a Technical Benchmark — 8K Polling at 49g Is Legitimately Impressive
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor running at 8K HyperSpeed polling rate is not a spec sheet exercise — it means the mouse reports its position to your PC 8,000 times per second. Combined with a 49g body, this is the most aggressively spec'd ambidextrous mouse ever released. Early reviews are uniformly positive. I expect this to land firmly in the top 3 once the review corpus matures.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2-DEX Still Holds #1 Because Community Trust Is a Real Competitive Advantage
highlights.body: The HERO 2 sensor at 9.5 sensor performance is matched by several competitors now. What isn't matched is the track record: years of pro-level tournament use, verified zero-failure wireless connections during matches, and the ergonomic form factor that a significant plurality of professional FPS players have converged on independently. Trust built over years doesn't disappear overnight.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike's HITS System Is Genuinely Novel — But It's for a Different Player
highlights.body: The Haptic Inductive Trigger System is the first meaningful click mechanism innovation in years — magnetic sensing with 10 actuation stages and 5 reset point configurations is technically ambitious. But the sweet spot for the Superstrike is the player who wants click feedback as a competitive tool, not just a feature. That's a meaningful but niche population, which is why the DEX remains #1 for the broader FPS audience.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync Is the Battery Innovation That the Industry Has Needed
highlights.body: Every high-performance wireless mouse faces the same tradeoff: polling rate vs. battery life. FrameSync sidesteps it by synchronizing sensor scan cycles with the MCU clock, eliminating redundant processing. The result is meaningful battery life extension at 8K polling without any latency penalty. This is the kind of low-level engineering that doesn't make headlines but makes products genuinely better.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at #4 Is Still the Best Value — Nothing Has Changed That
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's launch at $159 doesn't make the V3 HyperSpeed at $79 less compelling. The V3's ambidextrous shape, HyperSpeed wireless, and 280-hour battery remain the best value package in wireless gaming mice. If your budget is under $100, this remains the obvious choice — and it will stay that way until Razer prices the V4 Pro's features into the budget tier.

zh-tw.commentary: 3 月 30 日，Razer Viper V4 Pro 認真地進入討論。這不只是另一款 Viper 更新——Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器、8K HyperSpeed 輪詢率和 49g 重量，讓它成為 2026 年發布的技術上最令人印象深刻的左右手通用無線滑鼠。它以暫定第 12 名登場等待早期評測累積，但我預期它在下次更新中會大幅上升。僅感測器規格——50,000 DPI 加 8K 輪詢——就代表了對它所取代的 Viper V3 的真正世代性飛躍。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 守住第 1，這是應得的。HERO 2 感測器在競技社群中的口碑建立在多年職業級驗證上，而不是行銷說詞。Razer 的 FrameSync 技術值得特別提及：通過將感測器掃描週期與 MCU 同步，它在不犧牲任何性能的情況下顯著延長了電池壽命。這才是真正有意義的工程創新。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 以技術基準登場——8K 輪詢加 49g 確實令人印象深刻
highlights.body: V4 Pro 的 Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器以 8K HyperSpeed 輪詢率運行，不只是規格表上的數字——這意味著滑鼠每秒向電腦報告位置 8,000 次。加上 49g 的機身，這是有史以來規格最激進的左右手通用滑鼠。早期評測一致正面。一旦評測積累成熟，我預期它會穩固進入前三名。

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2-DEX 仍守住第 1，因為社群信任是真實的競爭優勢
highlights.body: HERO 2 感測器 9.5 的性能評分現在有幾款競爭對手可以比肩。無法比肩的是口碑：多年職業級賽事使用、驗證的比賽期間無線連接零失敗，以及大量職業 FPS 選手獨立收斂於此的人體工學外型。多年累積的信任不會在一夜之間消失。

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 的 HITS 系統是真正的創新——但它針對不同類型的玩家
highlights.body: 磁感應觸發系統是多年來最有意義的點擊機制創新——帶有 10 個觸發階段和 5 個復位點配置的磁感應技術是技術上的雄心壯志。但 Superstrike 的甜蜜點是想把點擊反饋作為競技工具的玩家，而不只是功能。那是有意義但小眾的群體，這就是為什麼 DEX 仍然是更廣泛 FPS 受眾的第 1 名。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 是業界需要已久的電池創新
highlights.body: 每款高性能無線滑鼠都面臨同樣的取捨：輪詢率與電池壽命。FrameSync 通過將感測器掃描週期與 MCU 時鐘同步、消除冗餘處理來繞過這個問題。結果是在 8K 輪詢下有意義的電池壽命延長，而沒有任何延遲代價。這種底層工程不會登上頭條，卻讓產品真正更好。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed 第 4 名仍是最佳性價比——沒有任何改變這一點
highlights.body: V4 Pro 以 $159 上市，並不讓 $79 的 V3 HyperSpeed 變得不那麼吸引人。V3 的左右手通用外型、HyperSpeed 無線和 280 小時電池仍是無線電競滑鼠最佳的性價比組合。如果你的預算在 $100 以下，這仍然是顯而易見的選擇——在 Razer 把 V4 Pro 的功能降價到預算段之前，它都會是。

references.title: 2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice
Pulsar Gaming x ZywOo limited edition mouse

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro earns its official #2 ranking today after sufficient early reviews have accumulated. The verdict is unambiguous: 8K HyperSpeed polling, Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, FrameSync battery optimization, and a 49g body that makes the previous generation feel heavy. This is the best ambidextrous wireless mouse ever made, and I'm confident saying that. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX holds #1 — not because it beats the V4 Pro on specs, but because the DEX's ergonomic form factor has a genuine competitive advantage for the majority of right-handed FPS players that an ambidextrous shape cannot replicate. The DEX is a better mouse for most people; the V4 Pro is a better mouse on paper. That distinction matters. The DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed drops to #3 as the V4 Pro claims #2, but it remains my value recommendation: $99 for the best ergonomic shape at 64g with proven wireless is still an exceptional deal. The Pulsar x ZywOo limited edition selling out confirms what everyone in competitive gaming already knows — pro endorsements convert to hardware purchases, and ZywOo's name carries real weight with CS2 players.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Confirmed at #2 — This Is the Best Ambidextrous Wireless Mouse Ever Made
highlights.body: After accumulating enough real-world reviews, the V4 Pro's position is clear: Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, 8K polling, FrameSync, Gen-4 optical switches, and 49g in an ambidextrous shell is a combination that no competitor matches in 2026. If you use a fingertip or claw grip, or play with your left hand, this is the definitive choice and it isn't close.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2-DEX Stays at #1 Because Ergonomic Fit Beats Raw Specs for Most Players
highlights.body: I've watched competitive players switch from ambidextrous mice to ergonomic mice and improve their performance — not because the specs changed, but because the shape fit their hand better. The DEX's asymmetric profile is designed for right-handed palm and claw grip, and that specificity creates a real performance advantage. The V4 Pro is more impressive on a spec sheet; the DEX makes more players perform better. That's why it's #1.

highlights.title: Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at #3 Is Still the Best Value — $99 for 64g Is Not Going to Be Beat Anytime Soon
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's arrival pushes the DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed to #3, but its value proposition is unchanged. The most ergonomically studied shape in competitive gaming, at 64g, with proven HyperSpeed wireless, for $99 — that's a deal that will still be compelling when the V4 Pro is two generations old. If you need an ergonomic mouse and don't want to spend $159, this is the answer.

highlights.title: Pulsar x ZywOo Limited Edition Selling Out Proves Pro Influence on Hardware Is Real and Immediate
highlights.body: 5,000 units at $139.95 sold through. ZywOo's status as one of the highest-rated CS2 professionals in the world directly converted to purchase intent, and the sell-out happened within days of release. This is the clearest demonstration of why competitive gaming partnerships matter for hardware brands — the audience doesn't just admire pros, they literally buy what pros use.

highlights.title: G-Wolves Lycan 8K at 28.8g Is a Preview of Where Ultralight Is Heading
highlights.body: 28.8 grams. That's the weight of a large paperclip multiplied by ten. The Lycan 8K with PMW-3950 sensor represents the current frontier of ultralight wireless gaming mice. I haven't added it to the ranking yet — I need more review data — but it signals that the 40-50g category that felt ultralight just two years ago will soon feel ordinary.

zh-tw.commentary: 在足夠的早期評測累積之後，Razer Viper V4 Pro 今天正式確立其第 2 名的地位。結論毫不含糊：8K HyperSpeed 輪詢、Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器、FrameSync 電池優化，以及讓前代感覺沉重的 49g 機身。這是有史以來最好的左右手通用無線滑鼠，我有信心這樣說。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 守住第 1——不是因為它在規格上擊敗 V4 Pro，而是因為 DEX 的人體工學外型對大多數右手 FPS 玩家有左右手通用外型無法複製的真實競技優勢。DEX 對大多數人是更好的滑鼠；V4 Pro 在紙面上是更好的滑鼠。這個區別很重要。DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 隨著 V4 Pro 升至第 2 而退至第 3，但它仍然是我的性價比推薦：$99 換來最佳人體工學外型加 64g 加驗證的無線，仍然是非凡的交易。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 確立第 2——這是有史以來最好的左右手通用無線滑鼠
highlights.body: 在積累足夠多的真實評測後，V4 Pro 的地位很清晰：Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器、8K 輪詢、FrameSync、第四代光學開關，以及左右手通用殼體中的 49g，是 2026 年沒有競爭對手能匹敵的組合。如果你使用指尖或爪式握持，或用左手玩，這是最終的選擇，而且差距不小。

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2-DEX 維持第 1，因為人體工學配合對大多數玩家來說勝過原始規格
highlights.body: 我見過競技玩家從左右手通用滑鼠換到人體工學滑鼠後提升表現——不是因為規格變了，而是因為外型更適合他們的手。DEX 的不對稱輪廓為右手手掌和爪式握持設計，這種針對性創造了真實的性能優勢。V4 Pro 在規格表上更令人印象深刻；DEX 讓更多玩家表現更好。這就是它排名第 1 的原因。

highlights.title: 第 3 名的 Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 仍是最佳性價比——$99 換 64g 短期內不會被超越
highlights.body: V4 Pro 的到來讓 DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 退至第 3，但其性價比論述沒有改變。電競遊戲中研究最透徹的人體工學外型，64g，驗證的 HyperSpeed 無線，$99——在 V4 Pro 已兩代之後這個交易仍然會有吸引力。如果你需要人體工學滑鼠但不想花 $159，這是答案。

highlights.title: Pulsar x ZywOo 限量版售罄証明職業選手對硬體的影響是真實且即時的
highlights.body: 5,000 組以 $139.95 售罄。ZywOo 作為世界頂級 CS2 職業選手之一的地位直接轉化為購買意願，上架後數日即告售罄。這是職業電競合作對硬體品牌重要性的最清晰示範——受眾不只是欣賞職業選手，他們確實會購買職業選手使用的東西。

highlights.title: G-Wolves Lycan 8K 重 28.8g，是超輕滑鼠未來的預覽
highlights.body: 28.8 克。那是一個大迴紋針乘以十的重量。搭載 PMW-3950 感測器的 Lycan 8K 代表目前超輕無線電競滑鼠的前沿。我還沒有把它加入排行榜——我需要更多評測數據——但它標誌著兩年前感覺超輕的 40-50g 品類很快就會顯得普通。
